title: Hair Stylist
description:
Job Title: Senior Hair Stylist (Hair Artisan)

Location: Fresh Aura Wellness & Holistic Salon

Job Summary

Fresh Aura is seeking a passionate, creative, and wellness-minded Senior Hair Stylist to join our team. At Fresh Aura, we provide more than just a haircut; we provide a rejuvenating experience. The ideal candidate is a master of their craft who values hair health, organic beauty standards, and exceptional guest hospitality. You will be responsible for providing high-quality hair services while maintaining the serene atmosphere our clients love.

Core Responsibilities

  • Expert Styling: Perform a wide range of services including precision cutting, advanced color application, and restorative treatments.

  • Consultation: Conduct thorough, professional consultations to understand client goals while prioritizing the health and integrity of their hair.

  • Wellness Experience: Deliver the "Fresh Aura" signature experience, which includes scalp massages and educating clients on holistic hair care routines.

  • Retail Excellence: Recommend professional-grade and organic home-care products to help clients maintain their look and hair health.

  • Environment Upkeep: Maintain a clean, organized, and aesthetically pleasing station in line with salon hygiene standards.

Job Requirements

  • Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of experience behind the chair in a professional salon environment.

  • Technical Skill: Proficiency in modern coloring techniques and various cutting styles (men’s, women’s, and textured hair).

  • Communication: Exceptional verbal communication and interpersonal skills; ability to make clients feel calm and heard.

  • Mindset: A positive, team-oriented attitude with a commitment to continuous learning and staying updated on industry trends.

  • Physical Stamina: Ability to stand for long periods and perform repetitive hand/arm movements.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with eco-friendly or low-toxin color brands.

  • An existing client following is a major plus.

  • Certification in specialized services (e.g., Extensions or Keratin treatments).

What We Offer

  • Competitive commission-based pay or hourly rate.

  • A calm, beautiful, and low-stress work environment.

  • Continuous education and professional development workshops.

  • Generous employee discounts on services and wellness products.

postedCompany.description:
Fresh Aura Private Limited

The Friendly Neighborhood Salon

Best for: Family-owned shops, approachable walk-in salons, and community staples.

We pride ourselves on being a welcoming space where everyone from kids to seniors can get a high-quality look at an affordable price. Our friendly team is passionate about great service and building lasting relationships with our clients. At our salon, you’re not just a guest; you’re family.
